header.name: Thiago Costa
header.bio: M.S. in AI at Florida Atlantic University. Building AI solutions, multi-agent systems, and scaling content about Artificial Intelligence.

tldr.heading: TL;DR
tldr.degreeLink: pursuing my M.S. in AI at Florida Atlantic University
tldr.followersEnd: , and creating content about AI for 100k+ followers.

about.introP1: I'm a Brazilian AI engineer and M.S. student at Florida Atlantic University, passionate about turning complex AI concepts into practical, applied solutions. From multi-agent systems and RAG pipelines to deep learning models, I love bridging the gap between research and real-world solutions.
about.introP2: Beyond engineering, I believe in the power of communication. Through SIEG IA I translate cutting-edge AI topics into accessible content for a community of over 100k followers, combining technical depth with clear storytelling.
about.cardAiBody: Multi-agent systems, RAG, deep learning, NLP, prompt engineering and model evaluation with PyTorch, LangChain, and vector databases.
about.cardProductBody: End-to-end prototype development, connecting interfaces, orchestration and output flows into functional AI-powered products.
about.cardCommBody: Making complex AI topics accessible through content creation, bridging technical and non-technical audiences with 100M+ views in 2025.

work.heading: Work Experience
work.netDescP1: Built the Web UI and integrated a multi-agent architecture for AI-assisted educational screening. Implemented a conversational agent with guardrails for structured context collection, a RAG pipeline with semantic retrieval and knowledge-base matching for learning disorders, and a PDF report generator with recommendations and specialist referrals.
work.netDescP2: Connected interface, orchestration, and output flow into a functional prototype. Project recognized with 2nd place at the FAU Agentic AI Hackathon 2025.
work.siegDesc: Built and scaled a content channel focused on AI news and trends, reaching over 100k followers and 100M+ views in 2025. Translates complex technical topics into accessible communication, building authority in AI, trend reading, and market positioning.

education.heading: Education
education.fauDegree: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence · Boca Raton, FL, USA
education.fauAchievement1Body: Recognized for the NET project, a multi-agent AI solution for neurodiverse educational support.
education.fauFocusBody: Multi-agent systems, RAG, deep learning, NLP, and data-driven experimentation.
education.uffMeDegree: B.S. in Mechanical Engineering · Volta Redonda, RJ, Brazil
education.uffMeAchievement1Body: Led a university rocket launch team, managing design and execution.
education.uffMeAchievement2Body: Assisted in teaching and mentoring students in Fluid Mechanics coursework.
education.uffCpDegree: B.S. in Computational Physics · Volta Redonda, RJ, Brazil
education.uffCpNoteBody: Built a strong foundation in computational methods, mathematics, and physics before transitioning to Mechanical Engineering.

socials.heading: Socials
socials.intro: Follow my AI content, projects, and daily life on social media!
socials.footer: Connect with me for updates on AI projects, content, and professional opportunities!

recentActivity.heading: Recent Activity
recentActivity.hackathonBody: Recognized for the NET project, a multi-agent AI solution to support neurodiverse students and their families through AI-assisted educational screening, RAG-based knowledge retrieval, and automated report generation.
recentActivity.speechTitle: 2nd Place – Three Minutes International Speech Competition 2024
recentActivity.speechBody: Recognized for a pitch-format presentation on the impact of Artificial Intelligence in everyday life.

currentlyBuilding.heading: Currently Building
currentlyBuilding.description: An AI-powered multi-agent platform for neurodiverse educational screening. Features a conversational agent with guardrails, semantic RAG retrieval matched against a knowledge base of learning disorders, and automated PDF report generation with specialist referral recommendations.

drives.whatQuote: "Grounded in theory, strong execution autonomy, and the ability to bridge research and real-world application."
drives.whatP1: I thrive at the intersection of AI research and real-world application. My engineering background taught me to decompose complex problems into practical solutions, while my experience communicating technical ideas sharpened my ability to reach audiences, from developers to business stakeholders.
drives.whatP2: International experience studying in the US, combined with continuous hands-on work in advanced AI topics, keeps me learning fast and adapting to new tools and challenges. I'm driven by impact: turning cutting-edge research into systems that people actually use.
drives.whoQuote: "The people who believe in you before the results arrive."
drives.whoP1: My family and close friends are the foundation of everything I build. Moving from Brazil to the US to pursue my Master's was only possible because of the people who supported and encouraged me along the way.
drives.whoP2: I'm also inspired by the growing community around SIEG IA. Every follower who engages, asks questions, and learns alongside me reinforces why I do this work. Building in public means building with people.

compact.name: Thiago Costa
compact.bio0: M.S. in AI at Florida Atlantic University. Building AI solutions, multi-agent systems, and scaling content about Artificial Intelligence.
compact.bio1: AI Engineer at NET, creator of SIEG IA (100k+ followers), and passionate about bridging research and real-world application.

recentContent.errorHint: Please try refreshing the page or check back later.
recentContent.blogIntro: Writing and research allow me to explore ideas in depth and share my discoveries with others. My blog is where I document my learning journey, share technical insights, and occasionally dive into philosophical questions about technology and its impact.
recentContent.blogFooter: I try to write regularly about my research findings, interesting technical challenges, and thoughts on technology's future. My goal is to share knowledge that's both insightful and accessible.
recentContent.paperIntro: My research work includes academic papers, technical reports, and other scholarly papers. These represent my contributions to the scientific community and areas where I've focused my research efforts.

projectSec.heading: Current Projects
projectSec.intro: Building meaningful projects is how I translate my ideas into reality. Each project represents a problem I found worth solving or a question I wanted to explore. While I have many interests, these featured projects showcase my current focus on creating practical tools that help people learn, work, and research more effectively.
projectSec.errorHint: Please try refreshing the page or check back later.
projectSec.footer: These projects are just a small sample of my work. I'm constantly building and experimenting with new ideas. Check out my GitHub for more or reach out if you'd like to collaborate!

researchSec.heading: Research
researchSec.intro: My research focuses on applying machine learning and AI to solve real-world problems. I'm particularly interested in vision-language models, transformers, and building intelligent systems that enhance human capabilities.
